## Meeting Purpose

[Impromptu catch-up between Luke Tubinis and Marcel Santilli, discussing personal life updates and professional challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/sasxxZAg3QS1QzL9AZ1ptqiKYBpv19Kt?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Luke's facing work challenges: SEO performance issues, potential job loss despite strong efforts](https://fathom.video/share/sasxxZAg3QS1QzL9AZ1ptqiKYBpv19Kt?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Marcel's company (growthx.ai) developing advanced AI-driven workflow platform, competing with AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/sasxxZAg3QS1QzL9AZ1ptqiKYBpv19Kt?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Both experiencing significant life changes: Luke with new parenthood and daycare, Marcel balancing work and family](https://fathom.video/share/sasxxZAg3QS1QzL9AZ1ptqiKYBpv19Kt?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Topics

### Personal Life Updates

  - [Luke: 5 months into parenthood, secured desired daycare "last minute"](https://fathom.video/share/sasxxZAg3QS1QzL9AZ1ptqiKYBpv19Kt?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
  - [Marcel: 2-month-old baby, wife reluctant about part-time childcare](https://fathom.video/share/sasxxZAg3QS1QzL9AZ1ptqiKYBpv19Kt?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [Both experiencing typical new-parent memory fog and adjustment challenges](https://fathom.video/share/sasxxZAg3QS1QzL9AZ1ptqiKYBpv19Kt?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

### Marcel's Company (growthx.ai) Progress

  - [Platform performing 2M+ workflow runs monthly (internal team only)](https://fathom.video/share/sasxxZAg3QS1QzL9AZ1ptqiKYBpv19Kt?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Developing "vibe coding platform" for workflows with expert intervention layer](https://fathom.video/share/sasxxZAg3QS1QzL9AZ1ptqiKYBpv19Kt?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Features: A/B testing, AI coding agent, learn engine for continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/sasxxZAg3QS1QzL9AZ1ptqiKYBpv19Kt?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)

### Luke's Professional Challenges

  - [Built "world-leading AEO practice" but facing perception issues](https://fathom.video/share/sasxxZAg3QS1QzL9AZ1ptqiKYBpv19Kt?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)

  - [Given 1-month timeline by superior (George), likely decision already made](https://fathom.video/share/sasxxZAg3QS1QzL9AZ1ptqiKYBpv19Kt?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
